headline: AST SpaceMobile JV With US Carriers Shifts Focus To Execution Risks
summary: AST SpaceMobile secured a central role in a new joint venture with AT&T, Verizon, and T-Mobile to expand satellite cellular coverage across the U.S. The company received FCC approval for direct-to-device satellite services, clearing a key regulatory hurdle for commercial deployment. AST SpaceMobile has signed significant commercial contracts tied to this collaboration, signaling a move toward large scale service rollout.
